dataset: Synthea (Massachusetts cohort); Task uses synthetic patient Robert Schiller created by setup

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 24, 30, 34, 43 - Patient inserted into demographics table with firstname='Robert'
setup_task.sh lines 24, 30, 34, 43 - Patient inserted into demographics table with lastname='Schiller'
setup_task.sh lines 24, 30, 34, 43 - Patient inserted into demographics table with DOB='1965-09-14'
setup_nosh.sh lines 10, 166 - Admin user created in users table with username='admin'
setup_nosh.sh lines 11, 148 - Admin user created with password 'Admin1234!' which is hashed using PASSWORD_BCRYPT

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on NOSH ChartingSystem, a real open-source EHR system (shihjay2/nosh2). The target patient is Robert Schiller (DOB: 1965-09-14), a synthetic patient created by the task setup script and inserted into the NOSH database. The administrative credentials are username 'admin' with password 'Admin1234!', which are created during environment initialization. All patient and credential data is synthetic, generated for testing purposes in an isolated Docker environment.
